subject: Image32 is now part of Citrix
body:
Hi there jeffrey,
Today I’m excited to share that image32 has been acquired by Citrix, a leading provider of healthcare solutions. Citrix serves organizations of all sizes, including 100% of the top 10 US healthcare providers.

Image32 will be integrated into Citrix Sharefile for Healthcare, enabling you to securely manage and share sensitive data, including patient files, labs, medicals images and more.

For the immediate future, your account will remain online in the same format with the same service you have grown to expect. In the coming months, we will develop a transition plan and communicate to you further plans and packages as those options begin to take shape. We believe this acquisition will allow us to provide you with better solutions to deliver and experience quality healthcare.

I would like to thank you for your business so far, and look forward to serving you as a part of Citrix. Please feel free to reach out to me directly if you have questions or concerns.

Best regards,
Bob

Bob Pellican
Co-founder and CEO, image32
http://image32.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1faec27b59029d1114f8d0e19&id=8035beed55&e=d239b5474d
http://image32.us6.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=1faec27b59029d1114f8d0e19&id=71f103aa6c&e=d239b5474d
http://image32.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1faec27b59029d1114f8d0e19&id=b1f953e59f&e=d239b5474d
